channel.title: Math on Akkeyre's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Math on Akkeyre's Blog

item.title: A Draft Post with Maths
item.description:
This is a draft post testing math rendering.

Inline Math

Euler’s identity: $e^{i\pi} + 1 = 0$

The quadratic formula: $x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$

Display Math

The Gaussian integral:

$$\int_{-\infty}^{\infty} e^{-x^2} , dx = \sqrt{\pi}$$

Bayes’ theorem:

$$P(A \mid B) = \frac{P(B \mid A) , P(A)}{P(B)}$$

A Series

The Basel problem:

$$\sum_{n=1}^{\infty} \frac{1}{n^2} = \frac{\pi^2}{6}$$
